allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/react-camera-pro/package.json'\); console.log\(pkg.version, pkg.main, pkg.module, pkg.types\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(p.get\('version'\), p.get\('types'\) or p.get\('typings'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in p.items\(\) if k in ['main','module','browser','exports','types']}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('vite-plugin-pwa:', deps.get\('vite-plugin-pwa','not found'\)\); print\('workbox-window:', deps.get\('workbox-window','not found'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); exp=p.get\('exports',{}\); [print\(k,'->',v\) for k,v in list\(exp.items\(\)\)[:20]]")
